idea-plugin.name: TestRail Gutter Link
idea-plugin.description:
Adds a gutter icon next to every @TestCase(testCaseId = "...") annotation in Java and Kotlin test sources. Clicking the icon opens the matching TestRail case in your default browser.

Configuration. Set your TestRail base URL per project under Settings → Tools → TestRail Gutter Link. The plugin opens <base-url>/index.php?/cases/view/<id> - for example, https://your-company.testrail.io/index.php?/cases/view/12345.

Matching. Any annotation whose simple name is TestCase and that is applied to a method - regardless of its package - is recognized. Only files under test source roots (e.g. src/test, src/androidTest) get the icon. Works with both the K1 and K2 Kotlin compiler modes.

Disclaimer. This is an unofficial, community-built plugin. The author is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by TestRail or Gurock Software. "TestRail" and any related names, logos, or icons are trademarks of their respective owners; the author claims no rights to them. The icon shipped with this plugin is used purely to indicate a link to a TestRail case and may be replaced on request of the rights holder.
